zh.Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓
zh.Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, Un: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey De Lucy於1324年4月出生在英國巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓時，他的父親Geoffrey de Lucy37歲，母親Lady Katherine de Grey26歲。他於1355年與Lady Margery de Lucy在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1399年2月12日享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓
zh-hans.Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, Un: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey De Lucy于1324年4月出生在英国巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Lucy37岁，母亲Lady Katherine de Grey26岁。他于1355年与Lady Margery de Lucy在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1399年2月12日享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey De Lucy was born in April 1324, in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Lucy, was 37 and his mother, Lady Katherine de Grey, was 26. He married Lady Margery de Lucy in 1355, in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 12 February 1399, at the age of 74, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey De Lucy est né en avril 1324, à Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Lucy, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine de Grey, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margery de Lucy en 1355, à Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 12 février 1399, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey De Lucy im April 1324 in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Lucy 37 und seine Mutter Lady Katherine de Grey 26. Er hat 1355 in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margery de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 12. Februar 1399 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey De Lucy è nato il nel aprile 1324 nel Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Lucy, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Katherine de Grey, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margery de Lucy nel 1355, nel Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 12 febbraio 1399, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey De Lucyが1324年4月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクウブリントンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Lucyは37歳，母Lady Katherine de Greyは26歳であった。1355年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクウブリントンでLady Margery de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1399年2月12日に74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey De Lucy(이)가 1324년 4월 영국 벅잉함실르 c블링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Lucy(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Katherine de Grey(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 c블링턴에서 Lady Margery de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1399년 2월 12일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey De Lucy nasceu em abril de 1324, em Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Lucy, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine de Grey, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery de Lucy em 1355, em Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 12 de fevereiro de 1399, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey De Lucy родился апрель 1324 г. в местности кублингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Lucy было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine de Grey, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery de Lucy в 1355 г. в местности кублингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 12 февраля 1399 г. в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey De Lucy nació en abril de 1324, en Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Lucy, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine de Grey, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Margery de Lucy en 1355, en Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 12 de febrero de 1399, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
